raw_source.title: 【Remote/Singapore/North America/China】秘猿科技 Cryptape- Developer Relations/开发者关系/海外运营/全栈开发/区块链开发/HR
raw_source.body:
## About Cryptape

People tend to see blockchain as coins. In Cryptape, however, we believe that the blockchain is capable of reframing trust. Cryptape is a distributed team with most members working remotely. We create trust with technology, provide infrastructure and services for the nascent crypto economy and opensource everything we created. We independently design and implement protocols, and we are the architects and engineers of our own future. Cryptape encourages knowledge sharing and participates in many key dev events to foster innovation, and we are convinced that innovation can emerge from every member of our team.

- Website: https://www.cryptape.com/
- Code: https://github.com/nervosnetwork
- Blog: https://blog.cryptape.com/

## Positions

## Developer Relations-Remote （intern/full-time）15-30k

The ideal candidate will be responsible for growing the organization's community of developers and refining its holistic developer experience to ensure increased operational success.

**Responsibilities**

- Advocate the uniqueness and potential of CKB technology and the opportunity of building on CKB.
- Write document and educational content for CKB and tooling.
- Engage with the CKB developer community, including answer questions and provide technical support to the CKB dApp developers, collect/summarize/report developer feedbacks.
- Organize developer community activities.
- Find and support solid dApp developers/teams building applications on CKB.

**Minimum Qualifications**

- Fluent in both English and Chinese, solid writing skills.
- Experience studying or working aboard.
- Participation in the general web3 ecosystem or blockchain project.
- You are a self-starter and hold yourself accountable.

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Solid programming skills and developing experience.
- Experience managing/operating a developer community.
- Passion for building relationships and growing communities online.

## Communications Specialist/海外运营-北美（intern/full-time）15-30k

**Responsibilities**

- Develop digital content and manage marketing campaigns for social media platform such as Twitter to increase key metrics surrounding engagement, sentiment, and growth.
- Maintain company's technical blog content to drive developer's awareness and interests.
- Identify relevant crypto, blockchain & social trends to join in and rapidly develop timely content surrounding these trends.
- Organize developer community activities, promote developer community events, collect feedback for reporting.
- Help develop and implement Cryptape’s brand and culture.

**Minimum Qualifications**

- Bilingual in English and Chinese.
- 2+ years of managing social media accounts with significant follower base or community building experience.
- Deep knowledge and understanding of social networks.
- You are a self-starter and hold yourself accountable.
- A strong team player and lateral thinker, comfortable working collaboratively, virtually and independently.

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Strong knowledge of the Blockchain and Crypto ecosystems.
- Passionate about understanding the latest trends in culture and Web3.
- Experience working within the open-source ecosystem.
- Experience studying or working aboard.
- Prior experience with Podcast or video production.
- Proven success at running developer community events and promotions.
- Ability to work quickly on developing strategy, content, and execution.
- Desire to develop truly engaging social media, with a creative attitude to think of unique material that will captivate our communities.
- Cultural awareness and sensitivity.

## Fullstack Engineer 25-45k

**Responsibilities**

- Design and build developer tools/libs in the Nervos CKB ecosystem.
- Explore best practices in building Nervos CKB dapps.
- Collaborate with internal development teams to enhance toolings as well as the whole Nervos ecosystem.

**Minimum Qualifications**

- 3 years experience in the software development field.
- Experience with TypeScript, producing reusable libraries/modules
- Good teamwork and communication skills.
- Experience working with rust projects.

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience working with open source projects.
- Experience with a non-TypeScript/JavaScript language
- Existing open source library maintainer is preferred.

## Blockchain Engineer 25-45k

**Responsibilities**

- Design and build a new dApp solution based on CKB to help participants collaborate to create transaction.
- Development language: Rust

**Minimum Qualifications**

- Proficiency in at least one system language, including Rust, C/C++.
- Solid understanding of the network programming internals.
- Excellent teamwork and communication skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Maintainer of open source libraries or experience working with open source projects.
- Experience in distributed systems.
- Experience in P2P network protocols design.
- Experience in lower-level computer systems, computer architecture, embedded systems.
- Experience in the development of Bitcoin or other permissionless blockchain.
- Love Rust.

## HR/Talent Acquisition-海外

**Responsibilities:**

- Deeply understand hiring needs, partner closely with business leaders and stakeholders to develop talent acquisition strategies in different geographies.
- Own the recruitment process - review resumes, work with the hiring manager(s) to select the right candidate, schedule interviews, facilitate pre-employment screening checks
- Support the effective onboarding of new hire, and apply for work passes for work pass holders.

**Qualifications**

- Minimum 2 years’ experience in talent acquisition
- Fluent in both English and Chinese, experience studying or working aboard.
- knowledge of full lifecycle recruiting components, including direct sourcing, behavioral & motivation-based interviewing, employment laws, salary trends, and relationship management.
- Ability to think globally, make calculated decisions under time pressure, and be sensitive/knowledgeable to international recruiting practices.
- Ability to contribute in a fast-paced, dynamic work environment and prioritize multiple functions and tasks.

**Preferred**

- Knowledge of the Blockchain and Crypto ecosystems.

## Job Nature

Full-time or not: Full time & Intern
Remote or not: 100% Remote

## Benefits
- 100% remote, contribute from anywhere in the world
- Welcome package & gifts of holidays
- Competitive health insurance
- Leading parental leave policies. Family planning benefits.
- Generous PTO / sick days
- Generous remote work stipends
- Professional development reimbursement
- Sponsored Team Building lunch and snacks

## Work Location
We have offices in China but the job can be fully remote, require English or Chinese spoken with the team.

## Contact
- If interested email us at join@cryptape.com
- You can also find more job opening here https://cryptape.com/#/joinUs

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
